title: Marinated Smoky Slovakian Pork Skewers
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring marinated pork, grilled to perfection with a smoky flavor, served with a side of romance and nostalgia, this satvik-friendly recipe is perfect for a summer evening
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together bicarbonate of soda, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Drizzle the olive oil and lemon juice over the pork and mix well
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight
Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately
